name: Reduce cp.async barrier pressure

summary.name: Reduce cp.async barrier pressure
summary.hypothesis: The new profile shifted away from long-scoreboard latency and toward synchronization overhead. A less stop-and-go prefetch schedule, with fewer or better-placed waits in the K loop, should reduce the 21.89% barrier stall and let the tensor pipe stay busier.
summary.expected_bottleneck: Barrier and wait-group serialization in the double-buffered steady-state loop.
summary.risk: Moderate. Reordering the cp.async pipeline can introduce correctness bugs or remove useful overlap if the new schedule is too shallow.
summary.stop_condition: Stop if barrier stalls stay materially high or runtime does not improve after one pipeline rewrite; do not keep tuning sync ordering past that point.

notes: Build passed. Node A must measure this implementation next.
